events: Black Dragon Master and Crusader decide to participate in performance
Black Dragon Master becomes assistant director, Crusader becomes music director
They name the theater company 'Black Knight' (combining Black Dragon, Crusader, Death King in Korean)
Death King hates the name but is overruled
They choose to perform 'Raviel and Kekerkker' - renamed 'Heart of Silver'
Black Dragon Master dances on white flowers turning them black with aura
Crusader plays invisible piano music with aura
The three get drunk and dance together
Ssonia decides he wants to personally act - 'I want to live like you'
cause_effect: Collaboration between top-ranked hunters elevates the art form significantly
The genuine joy of creating art together bonds the three hunters
Ssonia's witnessing of their authentic happiness inspires him to pursue acting himself
notes: The name Black Knight (흑기사) is a pun combining their Korean names. They dance to Libertango and Crusader sings 'Lascia ch'io pianga' - an opera aria. The Black Dragon Master reveals she wishes she'd come to Tower sooner so her father could have lived with her.

events: Death King agrees to help Ssonia act himself
Uses Dream Appearance to give Ssonia intensive training
Ssonia's debut performance day arrives
Heretic erosion rate at 11%
Black Dragon Master and Crusader watch from audience in original forms
Performance begins - actors create music with choreography but weaker without Death King
Ssonia sings opera aria 'Lascia ch'io pianga' at climax - unexpected twist
Audience stunned, heretic erosion drops to 10%
Quest cleared
Death King, Black Dragon Master, and Crusader declare stage clear simultaneously
Ssonia seems to make eye contact with Death King at the end
cause_effect: Ssonia's genuine aria provides emotional catharsis that pure aura performance couldn't
Introducing vocals to Fire Plays creates new art form
The collaboration between races (elf singer + goblin dancers) symbolizes unity
notes: Crusader reveals she ran a jazz bar called 'Little Venice' in early Tower days. Black Dragon Master mentions Crusader borrowed money from bad guys. Ssonia's gender is revealed to be female in original text (translator notes this was first time author used female pronoun).

characters: The Lady Who Walks Through the Mirage
events: Hunters reunite in waiting room
Lady reveals ONE hunter will be eliminated despite everyone completing quests
Offers Q&A as reward for 34th floor - one question per person
Crusader asks: 'How are Towers built?' Lady answers: 'By the Owner living the unhappiest life in that world'
Venomous Snake asks: 'What determines unhappiest?' Lady: 'He has to live many lives'
Black Dragon Master asks: 'What is the theme?' Lady: 'Self-awareness, like aim of an exam'
Death King asks: 'Why do you favor me?' Lady refuses to answer publicly
Sword Saint asks: 'What's at top of Tower?' Lady refuses
Sword Saint asks: 'Who is strongest swordsman?' Lady: 'Absolute Sword Master Zaqu...' - been alive 2000+ years, First Duke
Lady says Sword Saint's skill gap with him 'not even worth discussing'
Lady sends others away to answer Death King privately
cause_effect: Lady's identity as Pillar (above constellations) revealed
Tower built by 'Owner' who lives through unhappiest lives
30+ floor theme is self-awareness
The Absolute Sword Master is a 2000-year-old natural disaster-level being
notes: The Lady mentions 'Mula-Gaga... Nail!' as Tower Master. She says her security level was lowered because of Death King. The Absolute Sword Master has right to kill anyone except royal family without punishment.

characters: The Lady Who Walks Through the Mirage
events: Lady reveals she gave Flame Emperor his EX rank skill [Returner's Clockwork Watch]
Shows VR flashback: Lady doing 'Golden Goblin Lottery' event on 2nd floor
Yoo Soo-ha catches her and gets the skill randomly
Lady is an 'intervenor' Pillar who holds events
Personal reason: 'It's a lot of fun'
Death King asks for compensation: wants to see how his 'kids' lived after he left
Lady shows Ssonia's life: continued acting despite bad reviews, practiced until nails broke
Arika reconciled with mother, Yumar sent money to village, Sakum threw silver at former master
Ssonia dies old, reflecting 'I lived a good life'
Shows Uburka: reigned 20+ years undefeated, resigned to focus on martial arts
Uburka climbed Spirit Mountain to wait for 'Daddy'
Lady reveals Uburka is STILL ALIVE after 365+ years - reached Rejuvenating Body Stage
deaths: Uburka's original body (shed like cicada shell)
cause_effect: Lady's casual event randomly gave Flame Emperor his world-changing skill
Uburka's devotion and enlightenment allowed him to transcend normal lifespan
Death King's influence created lasting positive change in all his 'children's' lives
notes: The Lady apologizes by banging her head on pillow. The Golden Goblin event was literally a game she played for fun. Uburka's 'previous life' dream: born into warrior family with weak constitution, became family head through politics, died at 26 from illness.

events: Crusader volunteers to be eliminated so she can set up Black Knight guild
Reveals she never wanted mermaids to be hegemon, just peaceful
Black Dragon Master gives secret code for guild establishment
Crusader's points distributed: 1510 to each remaining hunter
Death King has 7112 points
35th floor begins
Quest: 'Age of Discovery' - new continent discovered 24 years ago by mermaid captain
Mermaid captain eaten by killer whale on return voyage
Black Dragon Master uses Instant Transfer to take Death King to Spirit Mountain
They find Uburka's mummified body - but Uburka appears alive behind them
Uburka explains he reached enlightenment, lived previous life in dream, shed old body like cocoon
Uburka challenges Death King to duel immediately
cause_effect: Crusader's elimination removes a companion but allows guild foundation
Uburka's transcendence makes him a Constellation-level being who can see mental forms
The quest reveals native inhabitants of new continent may be threat to seven races, not vice versa
notes: Crusader's real reason for leaving: she feels lonely/is uncomfortable leaving Civil Militia. Uburka waited 365 years, 7 months. He breaks his own mummy as 'souvenir' after Death King returns.

events: Death King vs Uburka duel on mountain peak
Uburka's destructive power shatters mountain peaks with punches
They fight using Infernal Heavens Demonic Art technique vs technique
Death King explains formation concept: if 12, 24, 200, or 1000 goblins combine aura
They demonstrate 'Burning Grave' - recreate fiery mansion scene for 3 seconds
Tower announces new skill creation: [Infernal Heavens Formation]
Purple (undetermined rank) skill card created
skills: Infernal Heavens Demonic Art - First Form: Sword of Starvation
cause_effect: Father-son duel becomes teaching moment about shared martial arts philosophy
Combined aura usage allows temporary reality alteration (manifesting Burning Grave)
The formation skill has potential to scale with number of participants
notes: Bae Hu-ryeong notes purple card is unusual - trial cards are normally white, not purple. The Burning Grave manifestation includes candles, mansion decorations, children's laughter, and wax dripping sounds.

events: Uburka explains current era: new continent discovered, 24 years ago
Mermaid captain's legendary voyage
Quest details: 'Age of Discovery' - seven races in danger of extermination, not natives
They find ghost ship with all crew asleep
Black Dragon Master suggests entering dreams
Death King uses Dream Appearance on snail captain
Enters dream to find fake Raviel trying to seduce him
Death King immediately recognizes fake (no wedding ring) and threatens Dream Demon
cause_effect: The 'new continent' situation is reversed - natives are threat to colonizers, not vice versa
Dream Demons can trap people in eternal sleep by feeding them happy dreams
Death King's intimate knowledge of Raviel makes him immune to seduction illusions
notes: Quest explicitly states 'seven races are in danger of extermination.' Mermaids' top 3 causes of death: crocodiles, killer whales, drowning (ironically). The fake Raviel doesn't have wedding ring or golden skill cards - details only real Death King would notice.

events: Dream Demon reveals itself: Dream Demon race, parasitic, lives in dreams
They invaded dreams of seven races over 24 years, learned memories
Currently controlling all 33 ships crossing ocean
Vanguard already sailed 10 days ago for invasion
Death King realizes quest means SEVEN RACES are in danger, not natives
Dream Demon explains they have no physical bodies, no individuality - they are mirrors reflecting dreamers
They plan to invade mainland, consume dreams sustainably but may 'consume too much'
Death King beats up Dream Demon and plans to spread challenge to all Dream Demons
cause_effect: Dream Demons see other races' complex memories as delicious food source
Their lack of physical form makes them nearly impossible to fight conventionally
The invasion has already begun - vanguard ships are en route to mainland
notes: Dream Demon takes Flame Emperor's form because Death King ordered it (can't bear to hit Raviel's face). Dream Demons learned language and culture by consuming memories. They have no king, no natural form.

events: Death King enters multiple dreams, beats up Dream Demons to spread rumors
Challenges them to come to Uburka's dream for negotiation
Operation planned: Uburka sleeps, Death King and Black Dragon Master enter his dream
Black Dragon Master reveals she knows Uburka has crush on her
She rejects romance: 'Love is allowing someone else to become your weakness. I do not want a weakness.'
Black Dragon Master reveals she stopped 8 abductions/assassinations against Death King
They enter Uburka's dream - jungle setting with hundreds of beasts
Dream Demon (as deer) appears, explains they have no king, no individual forms
They only reflect dreamers' memories and emotions
Black Dragon Master confronts them about the massacre
Dream Demon reveals it borrowed Black Dragon Master's childhood form (7 years old)
cause_effect: Death King's systematic intimidation forces Dream Demons to negotiate
Black Dragon Master's protective nature revealed - she secretly guards Death King
Uburka's unrequited crush creates comedic tension with Death King
Dream Demons' mirror nature means they reflect the dreamer's own personality
notes: Uburka's jealousy of Death King is intense - sees him as romantic rival. Black Dragon Master sees Uburka as 'younger brother' type. The deer Dream Demon reveals Black Dragon Master's habit of imagining people's deaths as worst-case preparation.

characters: Dream Demon (as young Black Dragon Master)
events: Death King threatens to kill and revive all Dream Demons using Hundred Ghosts Reincarnation
Dream Demon reveals Black Dragon Master's trauma: running from soldiers at age 7 with father
Father pushed her through barbed wire fence, stayed behind, was shot
The sound of father falling was her last memory of him
Dream Demon argues: 'No matter how strong you are, you can't undo the irreversible'
The moon in dream world cracks and shatters
Dream Demon agrees to recall invasion fleet but warns they'll meet again
World of Dreams collapses
People in port town begin waking up
Death King decides to tell Black Dragon Master his secret
cause_effect: Dream Demon uses Black Dragon Master's trauma to argue for preemptive pessimism
The traumatic memory is the source of her fear of irreversible loss
Death King's threat of permanent death (via Hundred Ghosts) forces temporary surrender
notes: The Black Dragon Master's real backstory: Ukrainian (implied by context), father died in civil war when she was 7. The 'iron fence with barbed wire' symbol. She never looked back as father instructed, last sound was him falling after being shot.

events: Death King reveals he is a regressor - has Returner's Clockwork Watch
Shows skill card to Black Dragon Master
Black Dragon Master initially tries to refuse hearing the secret
She reveals she suspected 'Prophet' was a lie
Asks about 11th floor battle - confirms he regressed until zero casualties
He reveals he did it because her smile when casualties decreased was beautiful
Black Dragon Master shares real name: Anastasia Zelenski
They establish formal friendship with signed contract
Contract clauses: promises require mutual agreement, can be abrogated by mutual agreement, only on weekends, dice roll decides disagreements
Uburka interrupts, Black Dragon Master deliberately implies special relationship with Death King to make Uburka leave
Uburka runs away crying 'I really hate you, Daddy!'
cause_effect: Death King's regression ability removes fear of irreversible loss for Black Dragon Master
Her real name sharing signifies deepest trust
The friendship contract is her way of formalizing boundaries while accepting dependence
Uburka's first love ends disastrously before it began
notes: Black Dragon Master's full name: Anastasia Zelenski. She reveals she has Item Storage skill - 'no better skill for killing people and destroying evidence.' The friendship contract is written in Korean. She hates being called 'senior' in front of others.

characters: Dream Demon (as young Black Dragon Master)
events: Death King uses Hundred Ghosts Reincarnation in Dream World
Summons all his ghosts to maintain his identity against memory erosion
Dream World is pink/yellow/blue - colors that erode consciousness
The ghosts' presence anchors Death King's sense of self
They encounter dreams of each ghost: Flame Emperor being worshipped, Lady of Golden Silk as empress, Hungry Ghost's village, Uburka crushing Death King
Hungry Ghost explains Dream Demons are like trait-type Constellations
They reach core: young Black Dragon Master form
Death King threatens to kill and subjugate all Dream Demons with Hundred Ghosts
Dream Demon challenges his reliance on force
cause_effect: Hundred Ghosts Reincarnation allows Death King to maintain identity in dream world
Each ghost's dream reveals their deepest desires
The Dream Demons' argument about 'power' vs 'logic' challenges Death King's methods
notes: Flame Emperor works at Planetarium Cafe with Kim Yul - called 'the twins.' Lady of Golden Silk works as Raviel's maid. The Hungry Ghost's dream: wolf carrying children in wheat fields. The core is protected by iron fence with barbed wire - Black Dragon Master's trauma.

events: Death King tells Dream Demon: 'You said Anastasia imagines people's deaths. But I became an exception'
Dream Demon reveals Black Dragon Master prevented 8 abductions/assassinations against Death King
Death King argues: 'Subduing people is power. Convincing people is power. Sharing a past and walking forward is also power'
He cuts through the iron fence and trauma scene with aura
Dream Demon recalls invasion fleet
Death King tells Dream Demon he'll wipe them out if they haven't improved in next era
Quest clears, people wake up
Death King tells Black Dragon Master: 'I am a regressor'
cause_effect: Death King's relationship with Anastasia proves that genuine connection transcends traumatic pessimism
His regression ability means nothing is truly irreversible
The Dream Demons retreat but warn they'll return when Death King is gone
notes: The Dream Demon uses the exact words Black Dragon Master said in real life about imagining deaths. Death King's counter-argument is that their relationship isn't based on power but shared experience.

events: Black Dragon Master reacts to regression revelation with shock
She had suspected 'Prophet' was a cover story
Confirms he regressed on 11th floor until zero casualties
Death King explains he did it for her smile
Black Dragon Master shares real name: Anastasia Zelenski
They drink together and establish friendship contract
Contract: mutual agreement required, changes only on weekends, dice roll decides disagreements
Uburka returns, Black Dragon Master deliberately implies romantic relationship with Death King
Uburka runs away crying, heartbroken
Death King returns to Dream World alone to confront Dream Demon again
Tells Dream Demon they can never change Anastasia because they only live on past trauma
Dream Demon counters: 'How many people can you find? Ten? Twenty? That's just a handful of dust'
Death King replies: 'Then maybe this will help you figure it out' and clears quest
cause_effect: The friendship contract formalizes their mutual dependence while respecting boundaries
Uburka's heartbreak is manipulated by Black Dragon Master to avoid awkward confrontation
Death King's final confrontation with Dream Demon asserts that human connection transcends numbers
notes: Black Dragon Master's Item Storage skill revealed - she pulls wine bottle and glasses from void. The friendship contract is very detailed and formal. Uburka's 'chicken poop tears' - Korean expression for large tears.

characters: The Lady Who Walks Through the Mirage
events: Death King requests reward: let him introduce Uburka to Raviel
Lady refuses to bring Raviel to 30+ floors (she has no 'visa')
Lady allows meeting on 29th floor only - Kim Yul's stage/Ascension City side story
Death King notes 29th floor has some secret even Lady can't reveal
Lady seals 29th floor completely - no one can enter
Death King arrives on 29th floor (modern city setting)
Reunites with Raviel at intersection
Raviel was doing morning work when Lady suddenly teleported her
They kiss in public, pedestrians stare
Uburka appears and calls Death King 'Daddy'
Uburka complains about Death King's 'special relationship' with Black Dragon Master
Raviel's grip tightens on Death King's neck
Raviel gives Death King 60 seconds to explain
cause_effect: The 29th floor has mysterious significance that even Pillars can't reveal
Uburka's innocent revelation about Black Dragon Master creates misunderstanding
Raviel's jealousy is triggered despite her trust in Death King
notes: Lady calls Raviel 'Silver Heart' (abbreviated from Silver-Plated Heart). The 29th floor is explicitly called a 'side story' not part of real history. Lady uses 'Administrator Authority' to seal the floor. Uburka's timing is comically terrible - interrupts reunion to complain about father's 'affair.'
